Index

Modules: supranim, supranim/application, supranim/controller, supranim/core/application, supranim/core/autolink, supranim/core/config, supranim/core/fileserver, supranim/core/paths, supranim/core/request, supranim/core/response, supranim/core/router, supranim/core/services, supranim/core/utils, supranim/network/http/webserver, supranim/network/websocket, supranim/service/assets, supranim/service/events, supranim/support/cookie, supranim/support/http, supranim/support/httpclient, supranim/support/uuid.

API symbols

`$$`:
  • uuid: proc `$$`(uuid: Uuid): string

  • cookie: proc `$`(cookie: ref Cookie): string

  • uuid: proc uuid4(uuidStr: string): Uuid
UUIDError:
  • uuid: object UUIDError
UuidVariant:
  • uuid: enum UuidVariant
variant:
  • uuid: proc variant(u: Uuid): UuidVariant
version:
  • uuid: proc version(u: Uuid): int
WebServer:
  • webserver: type WebServer
WebService:
  • services: ServiceType.WebService
WebSocketConnection:
  • websocket: type WebSocketConnection
WebSocketConnectionImpl:
  • websocket: object WebSocketConnectionImpl
WebSocketFrameKind:
  • websocket: enum WebSocketFrameKind
websocketUpgrade:
  • websocket: proc websocketUpgrade(req: ptr evhttp_request; onOpen: OpenCb = nil; onMessage: MessageCb = nil; onClose: CloseCb = nil; onError: ErrorCb = nil): WebSocketConnection
withAssetsHandler:
  • application: template withAssetsHandler(app: Application; handler: ApplicationAssetsHandler)
withChunks:
  • webserver: template withChunks(reqInstance: Request; httpHeaders: HttpHeaders; body)
withHeaders:
  • http: proc withHeaders(H: typedesc[Http]; httpHeaders: openArray[tuple[key, val: string]]): Http
withToken:
  • http: proc withToken(H: Http; token: string): Http
wsBinary:
  • websocket: WebSocketFrameKind.wsBinary
wsClose:
  • websocket: WebSocketFrameKind.wsClose
wsNone:
  • websocket: WebSocketFrameKind.wsNone
wsPing:
  • websocket: WebSocketFrameKind.wsPing
wsPong:
  • websocket: WebSocketFrameKind.wsPong
wsText:
  • websocket: WebSocketFrameKind.wsText
